title: FunnyTotem
description:
You will be able to apply Infinity on a Totem of Undying
which allows the Totem of Undying to be used infinite times.
body:
The FunnyTotem Mod introduces a game-changing mechanic that allows players to apply the Infinity enchantment to the Totem of Undying, granting it unlimited uses. With this mod, adventurers no longer have to worry about their precious totems breaking upon activation—once enchanted, the Totem of Infinity will persist, providing eternal protection against fatal damage.

🔹 Enchantable Totems – Use an Enchanted Book (Infinity) or an anvil to apply the Infinity enchantment to a Totem of Undying.

🔹 Unlimited Uses – An enchanted totem will never be consumed, allowing for infinite life-saving effects.
